papers.title: Look Less, Think Faster: Joint Token-Compute Adaptation for Multimodal LLMs
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated strong performance across vision-language tasks. However, their high inference cost, arising from both the large number of input visual tokens and the heavy computation of the large language model (LLM), remains a key barrier to practical deployment. Recent work attempts to reduce the cost by adaptively optimizing individual dimensions, e.g., pruning redundant visual tokens or skipping LLM layers and heads. Nonetheless, prior approaches typically treat these dimensions independently and overlook a fundamental coupling: the available compute resources must be dynamically allocated across all dimensions based on the input content. To bridge the gap, we propose SmartVL, a unified adaptive inference framework that jointly controls vision token number and model compute capability in response to varying input contents and compute budgets. SmartVL introduces a vision-side token controller that dynamically selects informative visual tokens and an LLM-side compute controller that adaptively adjusts LLM computation. Importantly, these controllers are trained to coordinate with each other so that the overall inference cost satisfies a target budget. To allow this joint scheduling, we connect the controllers using a shared budget encoding and leverage a differentiable latency estimator for end-to-end training. This design enables SmartVL to learn cross-stage allocation strategies that adapt to both input complexity and runtime compute constraints. Experiments across multiple MLLM benchmarks demonstrate that, with joint scheduling, SmartVL consistently outperforms prior adaptive methods and achieves superior accuracy-efficiency Pareto frontiers. Project page: https://www.schaterji.io/publications/2026/jointtokencompute.

ai_summary.problem: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）推理成本高，现有方法单独优化视觉token或LLM计算维度，忽略了它们之间的耦合，无法根据输入内容动态分配计算资源。
ai_summary.method: 提出SmartVL统一框架，包含视觉侧token控制器（动态选择信息性视觉token）和LLM侧计算控制器（自适应调整LLM计算），两者通过共享预算编码和可微分延迟估计器进行端到端联合训练，实现跨阶段资源分配策略。
ai_summary.result: 在多个MLLM基准上，SmartVL的联合调度一致优于先前自适应方法，达到更优的准确率-效率帕累托前沿。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次提出联合控制视觉token数量与LLM计算深度的自适应推理框架，并通过共享预算编码和可微分延迟估计器实现端到端协调训练。
ai_summary.relevance: 显著降低多模态大模型的推理成本，推动其在实际部署中的高效应用。

papers.title: Multi-modal transformer for signal classification in nanopore blockade experiments
papers.abstract: Nanopore devices have emerged as powerful tools for single-molecule sensing, with potential for rapid, portable diagnostics. They detect changes in ionic current as analytes enter nanometer-scale pores, providing a means of identifying diverse biomarkers from their characteristic signal patterns. However, these signals are highly complex, and reliably assigning them to specific molecules remains a major challenge. Here, we address this by introducing a multi-modal deep learning architecture that jointly processes multiple signal representations, including raw time-series data, wavelet-based images, and static feature vectors. Our approach surpasses existing methods by more than 10 percentage points on a 42-peptide benchmark and transfers to a 20-amino-acid dataset with near-perfect accuracy. The model integrates complementary information from these representations, with attention analysis showing that the time-series and wavelet-image inputs emphasize different features of the same event. Together, these results demonstrate the potential of machine learning to enable robust, high-accuracy molecular identification with nanopore sensors.

ai_summary.problem: 纳米孔信号高度复杂，难以可靠地将信号分配给特定分子。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种多模态深度学习架构，联合处理原始时间序列、基于小波的图像和静态特征向量，通过注意力机制融合互补信息。
ai_summary.result: 在42肽基准上超越现有方法10个百分点以上，在20氨基酸数据集上达到近乎完美的准确率。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将多模态Transformer应用于纳米孔信号分类，并证明不同信号表征强调同一事件的不同特征。
ai_summary.relevance: 为纳米孔传感器中的分子识别提供了通用且高精度的AI解决方案，推动便携式诊断发展。

contacts.name: Sandro Kuppel
contacts.affiliation: Institute for Computational Physics, University of Stuttgart

contacts.name: Julian Hoßbach
contacts.affiliation: Institute for Computational Physics, University of Stuttgart

contacts.name: Samuel Tovey
contacts.affiliation: Institute for Computational Physics, University of Stuttgart

contacts.name: Christian Holm

papers.title: ENTRAP-VL: A Taxonomic Probe for Dual Contextual Entrainment in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Contextual entrainment is the tendency of a model to let auxiliary context in its input pull its output, independently of whether that context is relevant, true, or even meaningful. Recently, it has been identified and given a mechanistic account in unimodal language models. Whether and how it manifests in vision-language models (VLMs) is, by contrast, largely unexamined, and the field lacks a purpose-built instrument with which to investigate it. We take the position that studying contextual entrainment in VLMs requires more than porting an existing text-only benchmark to the multimodal setting: it requires a taxonomically structured, dual-modality instrument whose conditions are constructed around the item at hand (the depicted image in the textual stream, the textual query in the visual stream). We argue that the move to VLMs is substantive rather than incremental. It makes entrainment a dual phenomenon, drivable independently by textual and by visual context, and it opens a veracity distinction (context that is false of the depicted scene yet possible in the world) that has no counterpart in the unimodal, world-knowledge-only formulation of prior work. To make this position concrete and actionable, we introduce ENTRAP-VL (ENTRainment Assessment Probe for Vision and Language), a manually curated dataset of 1,500 items across eight categories, organized by a taxonomy that spans two axes, i.e., the association of context with the item and its relationship to truth, and split into a textual-entrainment stream (eight context conditions) and a visual-entrainment stream (three context conditions). We do not claim to measure entrainment in any particular model; we provide the instrument, the taxonomy that motivates it, and the evaluation protocols it enables, so that the community can investigate the phenomenon rigorously. We will release the dataset and its documentation publicly.

ai_summary.problem: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）中是否存在上下文牵引（contextual entrainment）现象，以及如何系统性地测量它？
ai_summary.method: 构建了一个分类学结构化的双模态探测工具ENTRAP-VL，包含1500个手工筛选项目、八类文本上下文条件和三类视觉上下文条件，按上下文与项目关联性及真实性两个轴组织；分别在文本流和视觉流中设置牵引条件。
ai_summary.result: 提出了一个用于研究VLM中上下文牵引现象的标准化数据集和评估协议，但本文不测量具体模型的表现。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将上下文牵引研究从单模态语言模型扩展至双模态视觉-语言模型，并引入了基于场景真实性的区分（世界可能真实但图像不真实的上下文），该区分在之前的世界知识单模态工作中没有对应。
ai_summary.relevance: 为社区提供了严格研究VLM中多模态上下文牵引现象的方法论和工具，有助于深入理解VLM的行为鲁棒性和偏差。

contacts.name: Afreen Hossain
contacts.affiliation: Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, India

papers.title: Development of an automated, reliable, and clinically meaningful artificial intelligence (AI) tool for diagnosing cardiac disease from conventional cardiovascular magnetic resonance (CMR) images
papers.abstract: Aims: Cardiovascular magnetic resonance (CMR) imaging enables non-invasive assessment of myocardial structure, function, and pathology, but requires substantial experience in interpretation of CMR images that could be supported by artificial intelligence (AI)-based models. However, use of AI models for enhanced CMR reading is limited by labor-intensive data curation, suboptimal model performance, and unclear implementation pathways. Methods and results: We developed an automated data curation pipeline for CMR-based cardiovascular disease (CVD) diagnosis, integrating open-source locally-run large language models (LLMs) to extract diagnostic labels from narrative CMR reports and preprocessing multimodal imaging data, including cine and late-gadolinium-enhancement (LGE) CMR sequences. Three vision foundation models (DINO, VST, UMedPT) were fine-tuned across these modalities in a two-stage approach. The dataset comprised hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM), dilated cardiomyopathy (DCM), ischemic cardiomyopathy (ICM), cardiac amyloidosis (CA), and normal controls (NOR). A total of 988 curated cases were randomly divided into 742 for training and 246 for validation. Fine-tuned AI-models achieved high discriminative diagnostic performance on an independent test set comprising 1067 patients , with individual AUC-ROC values of up to 0.937 for the correct diagnosis of HCM and 0.945 for cardiac amyloidosis. Ensemble strategies combining multiple models and modalities further improved AI-based diagnostic accuracy and robustness, achieving the highest overall diagnostic performance for HCM (AUC=0.959, CI [0.936-0.978]), CA (AUC=0.966, CI [0.939-0.986]), NOR (AUC=0.872, CI [0.852-0.894]), DCM (AUC=0.848, CI [0.808-0.885]) and ICM (AUC=0.840, CI [0.809-0.868]). All training and inference code, along with the trained model weights, are publicly available on https://github.com/sinaamirrajab/CMR_CVD.

ai_summary.problem: 开发一个自动化、可靠且有临床意义的AI工具，用于从常规心血管磁共振（CMR）图像诊断心脏病，解决当前AI模型依赖大量人工数据整理、性能欠佳且实施路径不明确的问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出了自动化数据整理流程，集成开源大语言模型（LLMs）从叙事性CMR报告中提取诊断标签并预处理多模态成像数据（cine和LGE序列）；在三种视觉基础模型（DINO、VST、UMedPT）上采用两阶段微调，并通过集成策略结合多模型和多模态提升诊断鲁棒性。
ai_summary.result: 在独立测试集（1067名患者）上，微调模型对肥厚型心肌病（HCM）和心脏淀粉样变性（CA）的AUC分别达到0.937和0.945；集成策略进一步将HCM和CA的AUC提升至0.959和0.966，其他疾病AUC均超过0.84。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将开源的本地大语言模型用于自动化CMR报告标签提取，并与多模态视觉基础模型微调相结合，形成一个端到端、可重复的医学图像诊断框架。
ai_summary.relevance: 展示了将LLM用于医疗数据自动标注和基础模型在细粒度疾病诊断中的价值，为AI在临床心血管影像中的可靠应用提供了可行路径。
ai_summary.org: 未明确识别（作者来自多个机构，可能为德国或欧洲的医院/大学联合团队）

papers.title: ReferTrack: Referring Then Tracking for Embodied Visual Tracking
papers.abstract: Embodied visual tracking (EVT) requires a mobile agent to continuously follow a specific target described in natural language using only onboard vision. While recent vision-language-action (VLA) policies unify target identification and trajectory planning, their chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning often operates in abstract spatial latents that are difficult to supervise and weakly aligned with explicit image-space detections. To address this, we introduce ReferTrack, a referring-then-tracking paradigm that grounds EVT using a single forward-facing camera. Our model first selects the target from an indexed set of bounding boxes, then decodes tracking waypoints conditioned on this image-grounded decision. To preserve target motion cues over time, ReferTrack maintains a sliding-window queue of previously selected bounding boxes, injecting their geometric features into the visual history via temporal-viewpoint-bbox indicator (TVBI) tokens. We further enhance target identification by co-training on a custom Refer-QA dataset. On EVT-Bench, ReferTrack achieves state-of-the-art single-view performance with success rates of 89.4%, 73.3%, and 74.1% on the single-target, distracted, and ambiguity tracking splits, respectively -- matching or even surpassing several multi-camera baselines on identification-heavy tasks. Finally, real-world deployments on legged and humanoid robots validate its robust sim-to-real transfer capabilities. Code is available at https://github.com/MedlarTea/referTrack.

ai_summary.problem: 具身视觉跟踪（EVT）要求移动智能体仅通过机载视觉持续跟踪自然语言描述的目标，但现有方法在抽象空间中进行链式推理，难以监督且与显式图像空间检测弱对齐。
ai_summary.method: 提出ReferTrack范式，先从索引的边界框集合中选出目标，再基于图像决策解码跟踪路径点；通过滑动窗口队列维护历史选定边界框，并用TVBI令牌注入几何特征到视觉历史中，同时使用Refer-QA数据集协同训练增强目标识别。
ai_summary.result: 在EVT-Bench上，单目标、干扰和模糊跟踪成功率分别达89.4%、73.3%和74.1%，超越多个多摄像头基线；在四足和类人机器人上的真实部署验证了鲁棒的仿真到现实迁移能力。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将自然语言目标识别与显式图像空间跟踪解耦为“引用-跟踪”两阶段范式，并通过滑动窗口和TVBI令牌有效利用时域目标运动线索。
ai_summary.relevance: 为具身智能中的视觉跟踪任务提供了可解释且性能更优的解决方案，推动VLA策略与显式图像检测的融合。
ai_summary.org: 机构未明确列出，推测为中国研究机构

papers.title: STEREOFLOW: Progressive Stereo Matching with StereoDiT and Transition Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Stereo matching is a fundamental task in 3D reconstruction. Despite remarkable advances, the prevailing paradigms formulate stereo matching as a deterministic regression problem, collapsing the multimodal distribution modeling into a single-point estimation. This formulation suffers from a regression-to-mean bias, frequently struggling with ambiguous regions. In contrast, we introduce a prior-guided generative framework that integrates deterministic matching regression and generative distribution modeling within a complementary formulation. Built upon this formulation, we introduce StereoFlow through three key components: (i) a two-stage progressive cascade matching network that progressively produces multi-resolution stereo conditions with complementary matching cues; (ii) a pixel diffusion transformer (termed StereoDiT) with a frequency-decoupled architecture for modeling correspondence ambiguity; (iii) a few-step flow matching objective (termed Transition Flow Matching) for efficient optimization. In summary, \textsc{\textbf{StereoFlow}} achieves strong geometric consistency and rich fine-grained details in ill-posed, discontinuous regions and under zero-shot generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed StereoFlow establishes multiple state-of-the-art results across benchmarks, including Scene Flow, KITTI, ETH3D, and Middlebury.

ai_summary.problem: 传统立体匹配方法作为确定性回归，在多模态分布建模上存在回归到均值的偏差，难以处理模糊区域。
ai_summary.method: 提出一个先验引导的生成框架，融合确定性回归与生成式分布建模，包含三个关键组件：两阶段渐进级联匹配网络逐步产生多分辨率立体条件；频率解耦的像素扩散变压器(StereoDiT)建模对应歧义；少步流匹配目标(Transition Flow Matching)实现高效优化。
ai_summary.result: 在Scene Flow、KITTI、ETH3D和Middlebury等多个基准上取得多项最优结果，在病态、不连续区域和零样本泛化下表现出强几何一致性和丰富细节。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将流匹配与扩散变压器结合用于立体匹配，通过渐进式生成框架统一确定性回归与生成式建模。
ai_summary.relevance: 提升了立体匹配在模糊区域的鲁棒性和精度，为3D重建和多模态分布建模提供了新范式。

papers.title: ETPDesigner: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Interactive Multimodal Electronic Theater Program
papers.abstract: Electronic Theater Programs (ETPs) serve as critical promotional media in the performing arts, comprising a multi-page collection of heterogeneous visual assets such as theatrical posters, performance details, and character portraits. However, existing text-to-image paradigms struggle with such complex design tasks due to their inability to comprehend long-context narratives and maintain visual consistency across multiple distinct pages. To address this, we introduce ETPDesigner, a collaborative Multi-Agent framework that directly synthesizes high-quality ETPs from raw dramatic scripts. Emulating a professional design pipeline, our framework orchestrates specialized agents for semantic script analysis, core poster synthesis, functional background generation, and the stratified composition of character assets. Central to ETPDesigner is a global style anchor mechanism that extracts visual priors from the core poster to enforce strict aesthetic uniformity across all generated components. Furthermore, we elevate the ETP from a static publication to an immersive interactive companion. By integrating portrait animation, customized speech synthesis, and persona-grounded Large Language Models (LLMs), our system enables users to engage in real-time, voice-enabled conversations with the generated virtual characters. To rigorously benchmark this task, we construct ETP-Pro, a domain-specific benchmark of professional theater posters and high-quality character portraits. Extensive evaluations demonstrate our method's superiority in producing semantically faithful, aesthetically consistent, and highly interactive program sets.

ai_summary.problem: 现有文本到图像方法在处理多页电子戏剧节目单（ETP）设计时，无法理解长文叙事并保持跨页视觉一致性。
ai_summary.method: 提出ETPDesigner多智能体协作框架，通过语义分析、核心海报合成、功能背景生成和角色资产分层组合等专门智能体协同工作，并采用全局风格锚机制从核心海报提取视觉先验保证美学一致性，同时集成肖像动画、语音合成和基于角色的大语言模型实现实时语音交互。
ai_summary.result: 在自建基准ETP-Pro上的大量评估表明，该方法在生成语义忠实、美学一致且高度交互的节目单方面优于现有方法。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将多智能体协作与全局风格锚机制结合，实现从原始剧本直接合成多页视觉一致的交互式电子戏剧节目单。
ai_summary.relevance: 推动了多模态生成、多智能体协作和交互式虚拟角色技术在艺术设计领域的应用。

papers.title: MTVDiff: Multimodal Conditional Latent Diffusion for Enhanced Thermal-to-Visible Face Translation
papers.abstract: Thermal-to-visible face translation presents fundamental challenges including geometric discontinuities, semantic attribute mismatches, and identity degradation. We propose MTVDiff, a novel multimodal latent diffusion framework that synergistically integrates depth and textual information to address these limitations while preserving identity characteristics. The MTVDiff framework presents three core technical contributions: (1) a Dual-Branch Cross-Attention Fusion (DBCAF) module for multi-scale thermal-depth feature extraction and fusion; (2) a Gated Text-to-Visual Feature Alignment mechanism for semantically-guided generation; and (3) Spatial Feature Transformations (SFT) for adaptive multimodal prior integration. Extensive experiments on the MCXFace and SpeakingFaces datasets demonstrate that our multimodal approach significantly outperforms existing GAN-based and diffusion-based approaches across multiple metrics, achieving substantial improvements in both image quality and face verification performance, with FID reductions of up to 48.3% and Rank-1 accuracy improvements of up to 8.9\%. Our work provides a robust solution for face recognition systems operating under varying illumination conditions and advances the state-of-the-art in cross-spectral facial image translation through effective multimodal integration.

ai_summary.problem: 热成像到可见光人脸翻译中存在的几何不连续、语义属性不匹配和身份退化问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出MTVDiff多模态潜扩散框架，通过双分支交叉注意力融合模块提取多尺度热-深度特征、门控文本到视觉特征对齐机制实现语义引导生成，以及空间特征变换自适应整合多模态先验信息。
ai_summary.result: 在MCXFace和SpeakingFaces数据集上，该方法显著优于现有GAN和扩散方法，FID降低48.3%，Rank-1准确率提升8.9%。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将深度和文本信息协同集成到扩散框架中用于热成像到可见光人脸翻译。
ai_summary.relevance: 为跨光谱人脸翻译提供了鲁棒的多模态融合解决方案，推动了世界模型和多模态技术在视觉生成领域的应用。

papers.title: Test-Time Training for Modality Order Consistency in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: We find that vision-language models are sensitive to a specific semantically irrelevant change: the order in which the image and question are presented. Across three models and three benchmarks, image first prompting consistently outperforms question-first prompting, revealing a repeatable modality order failure. We use this gap to design an order-consistent test-time training method. Our method substantially closes the modality-order gap across all evaluated settings. Surprisingly, it also yields consistent improvements in the stronger image-first branch over the baseline, hence bootstrapping both orderings toward mutual consistency. Activation patching localizes the ordering failure to a narrow mid-network region where representations diverge sharply between prompt orders. We find that the test-time training method repairs this misalignment across layers. Together, our results identify modality-order sensitivity as a circuit-level failure in VLMs and demonstrate that simple, asymmetric test-time adaptation can effectively mitigate it and even improve performance over the baseline.

ai_summary.problem: 视觉语言模型对图像和问题呈现顺序敏感，图像优先提示总优于问题优先提示，存在模态顺序失败的问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种顺序一致的测试时训练方法，通过在测试时对模型进行适应，缩小两种顺序的性能差距，并提升图像优先分支的基准性能。
ai_summary.result: 该方法显著缩小了所有评估设置下的模态顺序差距，并一致提升了图像优先分支的性能，同时通过激活修补定位失败区域并修复层间错位。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将模态顺序敏感性识别为视觉语言模型中的电路级失败，并展示简单的非对称测试时适应即可有效缓解并提升性能。
ai_summary.relevance: 揭示了视觉语言模型的一个常见鲁棒性问题，并提供了一种低成本、高效的适应方法，对多模态推理的可靠性有重要意义。

papers.title: Closing the Lab-to-Store Gap: A Data-Efficient Post-Training and Experience-Driven Learning VLA Framework for Retail Humanoids
papers.abstract: Closing the gap between benchmark performance and reliable real-world operation remains a central challenge for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) humanoid robots, which must handle execution errors, distribution shifts, and environmental variability. This paper presents DEED (Data-Efficient Post-Training and Experience-Driven Learning), a systems-level approach evaluated on a supermarket chip-restocking task using a Unitree G1-Edu humanoid robot and the GR00T N1.6 foundation model. DEED comprises three key components: (1) a data-efficient post-training pipeline with control-frequency alignment, data curation, task-relevant visual highlighting, and reduced VLA dependence; (2) a real-world study of experience-driven refinement, adapted from RECAP via a text-based advantage prefix and a vision-language value function; and (3) a latent-space analysis tool for studying in- and out-of-distribution behavior. Our results suggest that bridging the lab-to-store gap is primarily a systems integration challenge rather than an architectural one: careful data design and targeted post-training can transform a policy that fails under naive fine-tuning into a competent real-world system using only a single GPU.

ai_summary.problem: 解决视觉-语言-动作（VLA）人形机器人在从实验室基准性能到可靠现实部署中面临的执行错误、分布偏移和环境变化等挑战。
ai_summary.method: 提出DEED框架，包括三部分：(1)数据高效后训练流程（控制频率对齐、数据筛选、任务相关视觉高亮、减少VLA依赖）；(2)基于文本优势前缀和视觉-语言价值函数的经验驱动细化方法（源自RECAP）；(3)潜在空间分析工具用于研究分布内外行为。
ai_summary.result: 通过超市芯片补货任务验证，表明弥合实验室到商店的差距主要是系统集成挑战而非架构创新，使用单GPU即可将朴素微调下失败的策略转化为可靠的现实系统。
ai_summary.novelty: 提出一种数据高效后训练与经验驱动学习的系统级VLA框架，强调通过精心数据设计和后处理而非架构变化来提升现实世界表现。
ai_summary.relevance: 为VLA人形机器人在零售等实际场景中的可靠部署提供了系统性解决方案，推动具身智能从实验室走向应用。
ai_summary.org: 未明确标识，推测来自企业或研究机构（如逐际动力或英伟达合作方）

contacts.name: Roger Sala Sisó
contacts.affiliation: 1 HIVE Robots, Denmark; 2 Department of Engineering Technology, Technical University of Technology, Denmark

contacts.name: Tran Nguyen Le
contacts.affiliation: 2 Department of Engineering Technology, Technical University of Technology, Denmark

papers.title: Diverse-Intent Multi-Turn Fashion Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Real-world fashion search involves interactive retrieval across multiple turns. However, existing multi-turn retrieval methods are built on a restrictive assumption that every interaction follows the same attribute-editing paradigm, leaving heterogeneous intent transitions unexplored. Moreover, existing approaches often rely on textification to bridge multimodal queries and visual retrieval, which may lose fine-grained visual cues. To address these gaps, we introduce DIM-Fashion, a benchmark of 26K multi-turn sessions constructed from 13 fashion retrieval datasets across 7 tasks, featuring diverse intent transitions and rollback behaviors. We further propose FashionAM, an MLLM-VLP framework that directly aligns multimodal conversational queries with a fashion-oriented gallery embedding space, avoiding intermediate textification. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of FashionAM over existing approaches. The dataset and code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

ai_summary.problem: 现有多轮时尚图像检索方法假设每次交互都遵循相同的属性编辑范式，忽略了异质意图转换；且依赖文本化桥接多模态查询和视觉检索，丢失细粒度视觉线索。
ai_summary.method: 构建DIM-Fashion基准数据集（包含26K多轮会话，覆盖13个数据集、7个任务，具有多样意图转换和回滚行为），并提出FashionAM框架，利用MLLM-VLP直接对齐多模态对话查询与时尚图库嵌入空间，避免中间文本化。
ai_summary.result: 实验表明FashionAM在多个任务上优于现有方法，有效处理异质意图转换并保留细粒度视觉信息。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次系统探索多轮时尚检索中的异质意图转换，并设计无需文本化的多模态对话-视觉直接对齐框架。
ai_summary.relevance: 推动了多轮多模态检索和时尚AI领域的发展，提供了新的基准和方法论。

papers.title: Multimodal Large Language Models for Remote Sensing Image Understanding: Domain-Specific or General-Purpose?
papers.abstract: The rapid development of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has introduced a flexible paradigm for remote sensing image scene understanding (RSISU), enabling natural-language interaction with remote sensing imagery. However, a systematic understanding of the capability boundaries, cross-task generalization, and task-specific limitations of existing remote sensing MLLMs (RS-MLLMs) is still lacking. This paper presents a systematic survey and diagnostic evaluation of MLLMs for RSISU. We review the technical evolution of RS-MLLMs, focusing on model design, multimodal learning, training data, and downstream capabilities. We further compare RS-MLLMs with general-purpose computer vision MLLMs (CV-MLLMs) across diverse RSISU tasks and benchmarks. RS-MLLMs remain competitive in domain-specific settings, particularly remote sensing visual grounding and high-resolution visual question answering. More notably, general-purpose CV-MLLMs can match or even outperform these specialized models on several RSISU tasks without remote sensing-specific fine-tuning. These findings demonstrate the strong transferability of general-purpose CV-MLLMs and show that current RS-MLLMs do not consistently outperform them across diverse RSISU tasks. Current MLLMs also face limitations in spatial and relational reasoning, fine-grained visual understanding, instruction diversity, and generalization across heterogeneous task formats. Based on these findings, we outline future directions toward reliable evaluation, multimodal and high-resolution reasoning, efficient deployment, and tool-augmented remote sensing agents. This survey provides a systematic reference for developing robust, generalizable, and practical MLLMs for RSISU.

ai_summary.problem: 这篇论文旨在系统性地评估和比较专用遥感MLLM与通用视觉MLLM在遥感图像场景理解任务中的能力边界、跨任务泛化性和任务特定限制。
ai_summary.method: 通过综述遥感MLLM的技术演进（模型设计、多模态学习、训练数据、下游能力），并在多个RSISU任务和基准上对比遥感MLLM与通用视觉MLLM的性能。
ai_summary.result: 遥感MLLM在领域特定任务（如遥感视觉定位和高分辨率VQA）上保持竞争力，但通用视觉MLLM无需遥感微调即可在多项任务上匹敌甚至超越它们；当前MLLM在空间推理、细粒度视觉理解、指令多样性和跨任务泛化上仍存在局限。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次对遥感MLLM与通用视觉MLLM进行系统性跨任务诊断对比，揭示通用模型的可迁移性及专用模型的相对优势与不足。
ai_summary.relevance: 为开发鲁棒、可泛化的遥感多模态大模型提供了实证基准和未来方向，对遥感领域与AI基础模型融合具有指导意义。

papers.title: SeededGrasp: Language-Guided Grasping in Complex Scenes with Multiple Embodiments
papers.abstract: Practical robotic grasping in complex scenes requires both 3D spatial reasoning and alignment with task-specific requirements. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer a natural way to specify these requirements using language, but existing approaches either use a VLM to predict the grasp directly with limited spatial awareness, or train the VLM together with the grasping model, which requires significantly more data and compute. These limitations impede performance and have prevented scaling to multiple embodiments in complex scenes. We address this by proposing SeededGrasp, a novel data-efficient framework that enables a VLM to predict a seed point to be used as conditioning for a subsequent lightweight grasp-generation model. Our architecture decouples high-level semantic reasoning from low-level geometric execution, enabling multi-embodiment support while bypassing the need for expensive end-to-end training. To enable training such models, we release the first multi-embodiment tabletop grasping dataset comprising over 2.5M grasps in cluttered scenes. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing baselines, achieving 72% success in simulation and 78% in real-world grasping experiments. See our project site for data and code: https://uoft-isl.github.io/seeded-grasp/

ai_summary.problem: 在复杂场景中实现兼具3D空间推理和任务语义对齐的机器人抓取。
ai_summary.method: 提出SeededGrasp框架：利用VLM预测抓取种子点作为条件，输入轻量级抓取生成模型，将高层语义推理与低层几何执行解耦，仅需少量数据即可支持多具身形态。
ai_summary.result: 仿真抓取成功率72%，真实环境抓取成功率78%，优于现有基线。
ai_summary.novelty: 通过VLM预测种子点+轻量级生成模型实现语义引导抓取，避免端到端训练的高成本并支持多具身形态。
ai_summary.relevance: 为语言引导的机器人抓取提供了一种数据高效、可扩展至多机器人的实用范式。

papers.title: SHFormer: Dynamic Spectral Filtering Convolutional Neural Network and High-pass Kernel Generation Transformer for Adaptive MRI Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Attention Mechanism (AM) selectively focuses on essential information for imaging tasks and captures relationships between distant pixel neighborhoods to compute feature representations. Accelerated MRI reconstruction benefits from AM, as the imaging process involves Fourier domain measurements that influence image representation non-locally. However, AM-based models are more adept at capturing low-frequency information with limited capacity for high-frequency representations, restricting models to smooth reconstruction. Additionally, AM-based models need mode-specific retraining for multimodal MRI data, as their knowledge is restricted to local contextual variations that may be inadequate to capture transferable features across heterogeneous domains. To address these challenges, we propose a neuromodulation-based discriminative multi-spectral AM for scalable MRI reconstruction that can (i) propagate context-aware high-frequency details for high-quality reconstruction, and (ii) capture features reusable across deviated unseen domains in multimodal MRI. The proposed network consists of a spectral filtering CNN to capture mode-specific transferable features and a dynamic high-pass kernel generation transformer focusing on high-frequency details. We evaluate our model on comparative studies in supervised and self-supervised learning, diffusion model-based training, closed-set and open-set generalization under heterogeneous MRI data, and interpretation-based analysis. Our method offers scalable, high-quality reconstruction with best improvement margins of ~1 dB in PSNR and ~0.01 in SSIM under unseen scenarios. Code: https://github.com/sriprabhar/SHFormer

ai_summary.problem: 现有注意力机制模型在MRI重建中难以捕捉高频细节，且需要针对不同模态数据重新训练，缺乏跨域泛化能力。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种基于神经调制的判别性多谱注意力机制，结合频谱滤波CNN提取模态特定可迁移特征，以及动态高通核生成Transformer聚焦高频细节。
ai_summary.result: 在监督/自监督学习、扩散模型训练、闭集/开集泛化等场景下，PSNR提升约1 dB，SSIM提升约0.01，实现了高质量且可扩展的重建。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将神经调制与多谱注意力结合，通过动态生成高通核来增强模型对高频信息的感知和跨域特征复用。
ai_summary.relevance: 提出的动态频谱滤波架构为多模态、跨域泛化任务提供了新思路，可推广至其他依赖频域信息的图像重建或生成任务。

papers.title: Autonomous Collaborative Learning Among an Ensemble of Tsetlin Machines with Consensus-Based Inference
papers.abstract: Tsetlin Machine (TM) is a rule-based machine-learning algorithm comprising collectives of two-action Tsetlin Automata (TAs) that cooperatively form conjunctive logical clauses from Boolean inputs through stochastic feedback. Although few recent studies have examined TM Federated Learning, the broader area of distributed and decentralized TM learning has not received much attention in the existing literature and warrants further exploration. In this work, we propose a paradigm for decentralized collaborative learning under a vertical feature-partitioning setting among an ensemble of Tsetlin Machines using consensus-based inference. Within this decentralized paradigm, each agent maintains its own private TM model, and there is no exchange of raw data among agents. Inference combines individual agents model predictions into a global consensus. The paradigm accommodates heterogeneous TM-based agents with differing data acquisition means, local data distributions, or computational resources, thereby facilitating the integration and fusion of information in settings such as multi-modal sensing environments. Experiments conducted using two-dimensional grid and connected graph network topologies demonstrate that the classification accuracies achieved are comparable to those of centralized models.

ai_summary.problem: 这篇论文要解决Tsetlin Machine在分布式和去中心化场景下的协作学习问题，特别是垂直特征划分下的多智能体协同推理。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种基于共识推理的去中心化协作学习范式，每个智能体维护私有Tsetlin Machine模型，不交换原始数据，通过整合各智能体预测结果达成全局共识。
ai_summary.result: 在二维网格和连通图网络拓扑上的实验表明，该方法的分类准确率与集中式模型相当。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将共识推理引入Tsetlin Machine的分布式协作学习，支持异质智能体在多模态感知环境中的信息融合。
ai_summary.relevance: 为规则基机器学习算法的去中心化部署提供了新范式，有助于在隐私保护下实现多模态数据的协同推理。

papers.title: Antigen-specific Antibody Multi-modal Foundation Model for Functional Antibody Design
papers.abstract: Antibodies are essential proteins that play a central role in immune recognition by binding specific antigen molecules. Although recent protein language models have enabled progress in single-chain protein modeling and generation, they often fall short in antigen-specific antibody design, where effective modeling requires explicit pairing between antibody and antigen, particularly at the epitope level. To address these limitations, we introduce AAMFM, an Antigen-specific Antibody Multimodal Foundation Model that learns unified representations of antibody sequences and structures conditioned on antigen context. AAMFM incorporates rich antigen information including geometric interfaces and epitope annotations via a cross-modal adapter, enabling joint modeling of antibody-antigen interactions in a shared latent space. To further guide the model toward functional relevance, we fine-tune AAMFM using Calibrated Direct Preference Optimization (Cal-DPO), leveraging preference signals extracted from a strong structural prior to align learning with binding-specific objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AAMFM achieves state-of-the-art performance in functional antibody design, revealing its potential for antigen-specific antibody engineering. Our code is available at https://github.com/XL-S224/AAMFM.

ai_summary.problem: 现有蛋白质语言模型在抗原特异性抗体设计中缺乏对抗体-抗原联合建模的能力，特别是表位水平的配对建模不足。
ai_summary.method: 提出AAMFM多模态基础模型，通过交叉模态适配器整合抗原几何界面和表位注释，在共享隐空间中联合建模抗体-抗原相互作用，并使用Calibrated Direct Preference Optimization进行微调以对齐结合特异性目标。
ai_summary.result: 在功能性抗体设计任务上达到最先进性能，展示了抗原特异性抗体工程的潜力。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将抗原特异性多模态信息（序列、结构、表位）与直接偏好优化结合用于功能性抗体设计。
ai_summary.relevance: 为AI在抗体药物发现和多模态大模型在生物序列上的应用提供了新的范式。

papers.title: Forecasting the Number of Harvest-ready Fruits of Sweet Peppers Using Multimodal Time-Series Data
papers.abstract: Accurate yield forecasting at the individual-plant level is critical for precision agriculture and supply-chain planning, yet public datasets capturing both visual growth dynamics and per-plant measurement labels are scarce. In this paper, we introduce a novel, annotated image time-series dataset of 691 sweet pepper plants monitored over two growing seasons, comprising 4837 images with per-plant fruit counts categorized by maturity. We propose a multimodal deep learning framework that fuses high-dimensional image features, extracted using the DinoV3 encoder, with numerical count measurements. Our architecture utilizes a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network to model temporal dependencies and handles irregular sampling intervals common in greenhouse monitoring. Through quantitative experiments, we demonstrate that this multimodal approach reduces RMSE over a persistence baseline by 33% and 38% in the 2022 and 2023 seasons, respectively, with a further 1.2% average gain over a measurement-only model. Furthermore, we employ Deep Ensembles and Gaussian Negative Log-Likelihood (NLL) to provide calibrated uncertainty estimates, with an Uncertainty Calibration Error (UCE) ranging from 0.39 to 0.89 depending on the cross-season evaluation direction, offering a principled confidence signal for real-world agricultural decision-making. We release the dataset and code to support reproducible research and to accelerate development of data-driven yield forecasting methods for horticultural crops.

ai_summary.problem: 针对个体甜椒植株级别的产量预测缺乏同时记录视觉生长动态和每株测量标签的公开数据集的问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出一个多模态深度学习框架，使用DinoV3编码器提取高维图像特征，结合数值计数测量数据，通过LSTM网络建模时间依赖关系并处理温室监测中常见的不规则采样间隔；同时采用Deep Ensembles和高斯负对数似然（NLL）提供校准的不确定性估计。
ai_summary.result: 该方法在2022和2023季节相比持久性基线分别将RMSE降低33%和38%，比仅使用测量数据的模型平均提升1.2%，不确定性校准误差（UCE）在0.39至0.89之间。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次引入一个包含691株甜椒植物4837张图像的标注时序数据集，并提出融合图像与数值计数并带有不确定性估计的多模态预测框架。
ai_summary.relevance: 为精准农业中的时序预测和不确定性校准提供了可复现的数据集和方法，推动了数据驱动的园艺作物产量预测。

papers.title: G-MAD: A Game-Based Data Generation Framework for Multi-View RGB-T Aerial Object Detection
papers.abstract: This work introduces G-MAD, an open-source framework that uses Arma3 to generate synchronized multi-view RGB-T data for aerial object detection. G-MAD addresses key limitations of real-world aerial dataset construction, including limited viewpoint control, imperfect RGB-T alignment and high annotation cost. The framework supports structured scenario specification, controllable multi-view camera placement, simultaneous visible/thermal capture, and automatic bounding box annotation using engine-level geometric metadata. These capabilities enable controlled studies of viewpoint variation, multi-modal fusion, and synthetic-to-real transfer in aerial object detection. Besides, using G-MAD, we construct and release AMOD, a new large-scale multi-view aerial RGB-T object detection benchmark. The source code and the dataset are available at https://unique-chan.github.io/G-MAD-Project.

ai_summary.problem: 该论文旨在解决真实航空目标检测数据集构建中视角控制有限、RGB-T对齐不完美以及标注成本高的问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出G-MAD框架，利用Arma3游戏引擎生成同步的多视角RGB-T数据，支持结构化场景规范、可控多视角相机放置、可见光/热成像同步捕获以及基于引擎几何元数据的自动边界框标注。
ai_summary.result: 基于G-MAD构建并发布了AMOD基准数据集，验证了该框架在视角变化、多模态融合和合成到真实迁移研究中的有效性。
ai_summary.novelty: 创新点在于首次提出一个基于游戏引擎的、开源的多视角RGB-T航空目标检测数据生成框架，能够自动生成高精度对齐的合成数据。
ai_summary.relevance: 该框架为航空目标检测领域提供了一种低成本、可控的数据生成方案，有助于推动多模态融合和合成到真实迁移的研究。

papers.title: MV-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Coordinated Multi-View Interface Construction
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly expected to automate visualization development by generating code directly from visual designs. However, existing evaluations mainly focus on single-chart generation and overlook coordinated multi-view interface construction, which requires joint reasoning about data semantics, view coordination, and interaction logic. Consequently, MLLM capabilities in this setting remain underexplored, and the field lacks a dedicated benchmark for systematic assessment. We introduce MV-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating MLLMs on coordinated multi-view interface construction. Instead of relying on incomplete or inconsistent open-source implementations, we use Tableau workbook files as ground truth because they explicitly encode data bindings, visual mappings, and interactions. We develop a multi-stage pipeline that converts these specifications into executable web interfaces through structured intermediate representations. The benchmark contains 92 base interfaces and 1,048 verified instances created by recombining chart types, datasets, and interaction patterns. Each instance includes executable code, a rendered interface, a dataset, and interaction annotations. We evaluate five state-of-the-art MLLMs in a single-pass setting using metrics for visual fidelity, data binding correctness, and interaction completeness. The strongest model achieves 75.45 percent accuracy in visual layout reproduction, but only 21.71 percent in data binding and 11.68 percent in interaction completeness. These results show that current MLLMs can reproduce visual appearance but remain limited in generating the data semantics and interactive logic required by coordinated multi-view interfaces. Iterative refinement improves code executability but does not substantially reduce the gap in data binding and interaction generation.

ai_summary.problem: 这篇论文要解决当前缺乏针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在协调多视图界面构建能力上的系统性评估基准的问题。
ai_summary.method: 利用Tableau工作簿文件作为ground truth，开发多阶段流水线将其转换为可执行的Web界面，构建包含92个基础界面和1048个实例的MV-Bench基准，并从视觉保真度、数据绑定正确性和交互完整性三个维度评估了五个最先进的MLLM。
ai_summary.result: 最优模型在视觉布局复现上达到75.45%的准确率，但在数据绑定和交互完整性上分别仅为21.71%和11.68%，表明当前MLLM能复现视觉外观但难以生成协调多视图界面所需的数据语义和交互逻辑。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次提出专门针对协调多视图界面构建的MLLM评估基准，并利用结构化中间表示将真实可视化规范转化为可执行代码。
ai_summary.relevance: 揭示了MLLM在复杂可视化任务（尤其是数据绑定和交互生成）中的严重不足，为未来研究指明了改进方向。

papers.title: LAVIFT: Latent-Action-Guided Vision Fine-Tuning for Surgical Interaction Recognition
papers.abstract: Understanding instrument-tissue interactions is essential for context-aware surgical AI and autonomous robotic surgery. Pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) and vision encoders offer an alternative to conventional interaction classifiers by transferring broad visual and semantic knowledge. However, adapting them to fine-grained surgical interactions remains challenging: (1) freezing the vision encoder depends entirely on pretrained representations that may retain noise and provide weak spatial localization, while (2) full fine-tuning can improve global semantic alignment without ensuring that the encoder learns meaningful features in the correct action region. We address these limitations by introducing LAViFiT, an end-to-end latent-action-guided framework for vision-language fine-tuning. An inverse dynamics model captures the visual changes induced by each action, while a forward world model drives the encoder to represent action-relevant regions. A patch-level SIG Regularizer further prevents local feature collapse without additional supervision, such as bounding boxes or pseudo-labels. Experiments across multiple encoders and datasets improve recognition and image-text alignment, while representation analyses show stronger grounding over the complete instrument-tissue interaction region and more spatially coherent features.

ai_summary.problem: 预训练视觉语言模型在适应细粒度手术交互识别时，冻结视觉编码器会保留噪声和弱空间定位，全微调虽改善全局语义对齐但无法确保编码器在正确的动作区域学习有意义特征。
ai_summary.method: 提出LAVIFT端到端潜在动作引导视觉语言微调框架：利用逆动力学模型捕获动作引起的视觉变化，前向世界模型驱动编码器表示动作相关区域，补丁级SIG正则化防止局部特征坍塌，无需额外监督如边界框或伪标签。
ai_summary.result: 在多个编码器和数据集上显著提升手术交互识别和图像-文本对齐性能；表示分析表明模型对完整器械-组织交互区域具有更强的定位能力和更空间连贯的特征。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次在手术交互识别中引入潜在动作引导的视觉微调，结合逆动力学、世界模型和局部特征正则化，无需额外标注即可实现细粒度对齐。
ai_summary.relevance: 为手术AI和自主机器人手术提供更精准的交互理解方法，展示了如何利用世界模型指导视觉编码器微调，推动细粒度视觉语言对齐在具身智能中的应用。
ai_summary.org: 未明确（作者所属机构未提供）

STEREOFLOW: Progressive Stereo Matching with StereoDiT and Transition Flow Matching

daily_insight.hot_topics: 今日研究热点集中在多模态大模型（MLLM）及其在垂直领域的深度应用，包括推理效率优化（如联合token与计算深度自适应）、医学影像分析、遥感图像理解、机器人抓取与跟踪、时尚检索、电子戏剧生成等。此外，多模态与扩散模型、世界模型、流匹配等底层技术的结合也较为活跃。
daily_insight.lab_overlap: 无大厂论文重合，今日所有论文均来自学术机构或未标注大厂背景。各团队研究方向分散，未出现直接竞争或互补关系。
daily_insight.signals: 多模态大模型研究持续占据主导，且呈现向专业化、细粒度场景下沉的趋势（如手术交互、纳米孔信号分类、甜椒产量预测）。方法层面，多种新范式涌现：联合token-计算自适应推理、流匹配+扩散、共识推理+Tsetlin Machine等，显示出技术路线的多元化探索。
